description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean white exterior walls. The front facade is accented by a pergola-style overhang above the main entrance, supported by slender columns, and flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light inside. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor partially open to a rooftop terrace that includes outdoor seating and greenery. The house is set on a rectangular grassy plot, bordered by two ornamental trees with vibrant purple and pink foliage. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony, and the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with large rectangular panes. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a pergola entryway, rooftop terrace, and surrounded by colorful trees on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pergola-covered entryway, large windows, and two decorative trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, the rooftop terrace, and the spacious grassy yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat, unadorned wall, more windows, and a single tree on the lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Pergola-covered entry with columns, large glass door, and minimal decorative elements
